Compliance.description: Established Sage provider with POPIA readiness program. No regulatory issues, fines, or complaints found in SA. Payroll/HR software implies labor law compliance via updates.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Strong 4.3-4.5/5 on GetApp, Capterra, G2 (300+ reviews). Positive on ease, legislation updates. Limited HelloPeter (1 app complaint). Employee Indeed 4.0/5. No major SA complaints.

Product Value.description: Modular pricing starts low for SMBs (under R25/emp core), good value with core features + add-ons. Transparent, no contracts, free trial. Covers full HR needs scalably.

Innovation.description: Cloud platform with mobile app, automation for leave/expenses/performance, legislation auto-updates, self-service. Good for SMBs but no standout 2025/2026 AI/new tech noted.

Customer Support.description: Phone/email/chat/live Q&A, 24/7 resources. Reviews rate 4.5-4.6/5 responsive; some SA payroll support critiques but overall strong.

Accessibility & Security.description: Cloud-based access with mobile app for iOS/Android, self-service portal. POPIA compliance efforts ongoing since 2021; no breaches reported. Role-based access implied. Mixed app accessibility feedback.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Core + Leave from R24/emp/mo; add-ons R10-14/emp/mo, Recruitment R1850/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Positive in software review sites (4.4+ avg). Limited HelloPeter/Google specific to SA; app complaints minor.
